meta-description: Learn about Point of Service (POS) plans by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Point of Service (POS) Plans
excerpt: A type of plan in which you pay less if you use doctors, hospitals, and other health care providers that belong to the plan’s network. POS plans also require you to get a referral from your primary care doctor in order to see a specialist.
content:
A type of plan in which you pay less if you use doctors, hospitals, and other health care providers that belong to the plan’s network. POS plans also require you to get a referral from your primary care doctor in order to see a specialist.
